backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing the service desk backend with CRUD operations for clients, jobs, parts, labor rates, user profiles, signatures, and Stripe payment integration, with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades the persistent actor state by adding a default `damageWaiver` field to all existing Job records that lacked it.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (Stripe UI cleanup, damage waiver toggle, invoice signature/sharing) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, used as a build-planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and sets the page title to the service desk app name.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines all TanStack Router routes for the app, ensuring static routes (`/clients/new`, `/jobs/new`) are registered before their dynamic counterparts, and provides the top-level `RouterProvider`.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component that handles authentication redirects, renders a sticky header with branding, a scrollable main content area via Outlet, and a fixed bottom navigation bar with icons for Dashboard, Clients, Jobs, Inventory, and Settings.
frontend/src/components/SignatureCapture: A signature capture UI component that renders a canvas for drawing a signature with mouse or touch, then saves the resulting bytes via the useStoreUserSignature mutation, with options to clear, save, or skip.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook that manage ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the app's backend actor, covering CRUD operations for user profiles, clients, jobs, parts, labor rates, estimates, damage waivers, inventory, and Stripe configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useSignaturePad.ts: Custom hook that manages a canvas-based signature pad, handling DPR-aware initialization, mouse and touch event listeners for drawing, a clear function, and a getSignatureBytes function that exports the canvas as a PNG byte array.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Rajdhani fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens including colors, sidebar, and charts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Weekly calendar view that displays scheduled jobs per day in EST timezone, with drag-and-drop reordering, job cost summaries including tax calculation, and status color coding.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a single client record, loading existing data by ID and saving via create/update mutation hooks with error handling.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Searchable list page displaying all clients with phone, address, and a Google review link button, navigating to the detail page on row click.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview page showing metric cards for job counts and clients, a greeting with the current date, and a list of the five most recent jobs with status badges.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Parts inventory management page supporting inline add, edit, and delete operations for parts with fields like name, part number, quantity, and unit cost.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Renders a full invoice preview for a job, including labor/parts totals, tax calculation, damage waiver, and a signature pad that saves the customer signature to the backend via updateEstimate. Also supports PDF export and sending the invoice via email or SMS.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Provides a form for creating or editing a job, including client selection, scheduling, labor line items, photo attachments, Stripe payment link generation, and damage waiver configuration.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Displays a filterable list of jobs grouped by status (Open, In Progress, Complete) as cards showing client name, date, and notes, with a button to create a new job.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the Internet Identity login screen with branding, a sign-in button, and redirects authenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Two-step onboarding page that collects the user's name and optionally captures a signature, saving both to the backend before navigating to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing labor rates, Stripe API key configuration, and authorized user role assignments, with owner-only access controls.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes. Supports sessionStorage-backed persistence and safe removal of sensitive params (e.g., admin tokens) from the address bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Rajdhani fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and animations (accordion, fade-in). Includes typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 47) tracking the architecture, known issues, and existing features of a single-canister ICP service desk app for Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC with a Motoko backend and mobile-first React frontend. Serves as a build-planning reference capturing owner principal details, role-based access design, and incremental feature history.
